chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD 2nd Appeal No.75 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For hearing of C.M.A No.2619/2025 (Return of Court Fee) 25.11.2025 Appellant Sain Bux present in person ********** The appellant by way of this C.M.A has claimed return of Court Fee. On perusal of the file, it appears that although the Court did not issue notices and that prior to issuance of such notices, the appellant had appeared before the Court and submitted that he did not wish to press this second appeal. In view of the forgoing as this second appeal was withdrawn prior to issuance of notice. The Court fee filed by the appellant may be returned to him subject to the rules and regulations. The listed application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
